respond.invalidBody: This response link is not valid. Please check the URL.

actions.acceptDesc: Accept the buyer's prices as-is. Deal will proceed to order.
actions.counterDesc: Adjust prices and reply with your counter-offer.

respond.messagePlaceholder: Add a note for the buyer (optional)
respond.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this bid?
respond.doneAccepted: You accepted the bid. The buyer will be notified.
respond.doneRejected: You rejected the bid. The buyer will be notified.
respond.doneCounter: Your counter-offer has been sent. The buyer will be notified.

whatIs.title: What is an auction?
whatIs.body: Suppliers post products with a bidding window. You place one sealed bid — no one sees your price.

sealed.title: Sealed bidding
sealed.body: Your bid is private. Other buyers can't see it. The supplier sees all bids only after the window closes.

timing.title: Timing
timing.body: Each auction has a fixed window (e.g., opens Monday, closes Wednesday). Place your bid before time runs out.

oneBid.title: One bid, one chance
oneBid.body: You can't modify your bid once placed. If you made an error, you can withdraw — but there's a 4-hour cooldown before you can re-enter.

award.title: Award
award.body: After the window closes, the supplier reviews all bids and picks a winner. You'll be notified of the result.

results.title: Results
results.body: After award, you can see how your bid compared to the winner (in $/kg and %).

auctionBid.title: Place Sealed Bid
auctionBid.subtitle: Your bid is private. The supplier sees all bids only after the auction closes.

commitment.label: I understand this is a binding sealed bid. If awarded, I commit to completing the purchase.
commitment.hint: You can withdraw your bid at any time, but there's a 4-hour cooldown before you can re-enter.

note.label: Message (optional)
note.placeholder: Add a note for the supplier (optional)

procurement.title: Savings & spend dashboard
procurement.subtitle: How much Mundus saved you vs market. Where you're spending. Which suppliers are pulling their weight.

upsell.title: Turn procurement into a competitive edge
upsell.lede: Stop buying blind. See exactly how much you're saving vs market, where spend is leaking, and which suppliers deserve more of your wallet — all in one place.

spend.title: Live spend & budget tracking
spend.body: Real-time view of YTD spend by category, origin, and supplier — with budget variance alerts.

savings.title: Verified savings vs market
savings.body: Every order benchmarked against the live Mundus marketplace so finance sees real, defensible savings.

suppliers.title: Supplier scorecards
suppliers.body: Grade every supplier on price, on-time delivery, quality and response — and surface concentration risk.

marketAlerts.title: Smart procurement alerts
marketAlerts.body: Get notified when prices drop on product / cuts you buy, when contracts expire, or when a category gets risky.

perks: Unlimited CSV exports of spend, savings and supplier data
Custom budgets and variance alerts by category

faq.howNegotiationAnswer: Buyers and suppliers can negotiate over up to 3 rounds of bids and counters before a deal is closed.
faq.minAmount: Is there a minimum amount for trading?
faq.minAmountAnswer: Yes. Minimum quantities depend on container size — typically 13 MT for 20ft and 27 MT for 40ft.

createOffer.title: New offer
createOffer.subtitle: Build it in one screen — AI fills the form from a file or text.

ai.title: AI Quick-fill
ai.subtitle: Drop a price list, paste a message, or dictate — we'll fill the form in seconds.
ai.placeholder:
Paste an email, WhatsApp message, or just describe the offer:

"Hi, I have 2 FCLs of premium ribeye 7-9lb at $7.20/kg, asking floor $6.95. Also 1 FCL striploin 8-10lb at $6.80. Going to Hong Kong, CFR, payment 50% advance balance TT, June shipment."

about.title: About
about.description: WMS Foods is a leading Brazilian exporter of premium beef cuts, serving 28 countries across Asia, the Middle East, Africa and the Americas. We operate three plants with combined capacity of 4,600 MT/month, all approved by USDA, Halal authorities and key Asian markets.

previewBanner.title: Preview · Premium add-on coming soon
previewBanner.body: Numbers shown are illustrative. The live version will use your real offer data benchmarked against the marketplace.

priceBenchmark.title: Price benchmark · {{cut}}
priceBenchmark.subtitle: See how your offer compares against all {{count}} anonymized offers of the same product / cut + origin. Competitors are never named.

hero.body: Your ${{price}}/kg sits at percentile {{percentile}} of the {{total}} competing Brazilian beef tenderloin offers shipping to Middle East. Dropping to ${{suggested}}/kg would put you at median — where 73% of buyer views happen.

distribution.title: Price distribution
distribution.subtitle: {{count}} anonymized Brazilian beef tenderloin offers · last 7 days

analytics.title: Supplier analytics
analytics.subtitle: Performance of your operation — last 30 days vs. previous period

upsell.earlyAccessToast: Thanks — we'll be in touch shortly.
upsell.salesBody:
Hi Mundus team,

I'd like to learn more about the upcoming Insights add-on for my account.

Thanks!

priceBenchmark.title: Know exactly where your offer stands
priceBenchmark.lede: Stop pricing in the dark. See how every offer you publish compares to the live marketplace in real time — without ever exposing competitor identities.

distribution.title: Live market distribution
distribution.body: Histogram of every competing offer for your product / cut + origin, refreshed every 24h.

ranking.title: Anonymized competitor ranking
ranking.body: See who you're up against by views, chats, and price — names always blurred.

alerts.title: Price-drop & demand alerts
alerts.body: Get notified when prices drop on product / cuts you buy, when contracts expire, or when a category gets risky.

suggested.title: AI-suggested target price
suggested.body: A weekly recommendation calibrated to your margin floor and conversion goals.

perks: Weekly market report (PDF) for each of your active cuts
Slack and email alerts on competitor price changes
12-month historical price trend per product / cut and origin

analytics.title: Turn every offer into a learning loop
analytics.lede: Go beyond vanity metrics. Understand which buyers convert, which regions are heating up, and where your funnel leaks revenue.

funnel.title: Full conversion funnel
funnel.body: View → chat → counter → order, with drop-off rates per stage and per cut.

cohort.title: Buyer cohort retention
cohort.body: See which buyers come back, how often, and how much they grow order over order.

geo.title: Geographic demand heatmap
geo.body: Spot emerging destinations early — by port, country, and incoterm preference.

sla.title: Response-time SLA tracking
sla.body: Monitor how fast your team replies and how it correlates with win rate.

perks: Monthly performance review delivered to your inbox
Unlimited CSV exports of any metric or chart
Custom date ranges and saved views per teammate
Buyer-level drilldown with full negotiation history
